message:
Add 10 Pass-2 beads: correlation, restart scheduling, pipelining, cascade breaker, smart snapshots, custom allocator, process tree, smart scrollback, auto-tuning, semantic compression

Pass 2 of idea-wizard workflow: 10 new beads with full descriptions,
parent-child links to their epics, and cross-dependencies wired.

New beads under PIE (wa-1qz1):
- wa-3pr0: Cross-Pane Correlation Engine (chi-squared event correlation)

New beads under Session Persistence (wa-rsaf):
- wa-lr93: Automatic Restart Scheduling (optimal restart windows)
- wa-2imn: Intelligent Snapshot Scheduling (event-driven triggers)
- wa-1i6d: Process Tree Capture Per Pane (/proc tree + activity inference)

New beads under Performance (wa-3cyp):
- wa-1lc2: Mux Protocol PDU Pipelining (5-10x batch throughput)
- wa-1l2o: Error Cascade Circuit Breaker (workflow-level protection)
- wa-ssm4: Auto-Tuning Configuration Parameters (proportional control)
- wa-2f2m: Semantic Output Compression (template dedup)

New beads under Fork Hardening (wa-3kxe):
- wa-3axa: Custom Allocator jemalloc + Per-Pane Arenas (O(1) teardown)
- wa-1c2u: Smart Scrollback with Importance Weighting (memory reduction)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
